# WhatIs.site

> WhatIs.site provides clear, human-written explanations of concepts, ideas, and terms across technology, science, finance, philosophy, history, and more.

## Categories

- [Technology](/category/technology): How digital tools and innovations actually work
- [Science](/category/science): The natural world explained
- [Mathematics](/category/mathematics): Numbers, patterns, and logic
- [Finance](/category/finance): Money, markets, and economic decisions
- [Philosophy](/category/philosophy): The big questions about existence and knowledge
- [History](/category/history): People and events that shaped the world
- [Psychology](/category/psychology): How the human mind works
- [Health & Wellness](/category/health-amp-wellness): The human body and medicine
- [Economics](/category/economics): How societies allocate resources
- [Law](/category/law): Legal concepts and systems
